extraction.one_line_summary: QUINTANA Nairo won Stage 9 after Team Sky crashed en masse before the final climb, attacking on the Blockhaus ascent to take race lead.
tactical_patterns: Movistar accelerated immediately before crash site, suggesting pre-identified danger zone reconnaissance or deliberate positioning before known pinch point.
Quintana attacked final climb while Sky leaders neutralized by crash, exploiting organizational chaos rather than pure climbing superiority.
Dumoulin isolated without Mollema's help on Blockhaus yet limited losses to 24 seconds, signaling time trial could erase deficit.

rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: Sky leadership collapsed after crash, over 5 minutes lost, revealing team's vulnerability to single positioning error
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: race ended by crash, Sky lost both GC cards simultaneously from single incident
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: positive: capitalized immediately on Sky crash chaos, attacked decisively on Blockhaus to take stage and race lead
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: positive: isolated without teammates on final climb yet limited damage to 24 seconds, unusual climbing resilience for big rider
rider_signals.MOLLEMA Bauke: neutral: admitted being on limit behind Dumoulin, couldn't contribute to chase effort despite being team's climber
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: finished 24 seconds behind Quintana to take second overall, imposed himself on final climb curves
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: caught in same crash as Sky, positioning error before crucial stage finale
